data.title: AMSP launches app to reshape congressional nominations by putting power in voters' hands, utilizing a legal loophole.
data.description: A groundbreaking candidate nomination system has been developed by America's Main Street Party (AMSP) using a legal loophole. This new platform aims to revolutionize traditional politics by empowering voters. The proof of concept for this system was completed in Philadelphia on October 17, 2025. This development could potentially change the landscape of politics by increasing transparency and democratizing the nomination process.

data.title: Hyper Solutions, a U.S. manufacturer of digital infrastructure, marks three years of growth and innovation in industry.
data.description: Hyper Solutions, an American manufacturer revolutionizing essential digital infrastructure, marked its three-year anniversary with a company-wide event in RICHMOND, Va., on Oct. 17, 2025. The company, known for its vision, growth, and purpose, is a key player in the Hyper movement.

data.title: Chino Commercial Bancorp's net earnings grew by 22% in Q3 2025.
data.description: Chino Commercial Bancorp (OTC: CCBC) revealed its third quarter earnings for the period ending September 30, 2025. The parent company of Chino Commercial Bank, N.A. based in Chino, California, announced the financial performance to the public. This update was shared by the Board of Directors, highlighting key operational outcomes. The results encompassed both the Bank and the consolidated holding entity, giving stakeholders insight into the company's recent financial standing.

data.title: FADEL wins 2 awards for AI innovation at AI-Tech Play Off 2025 event during DAM NY 2025.
data.description: FADEL®, a leading global provider of AI-powered brand compliance and licensing software, recently secured two accolades at the AI-Tech Play Off 2025 event hosted during DAM NY 2025, the top gathering for Digital Asset Management specialists. The awards highlight FADEL's noteworthy achievements in the industry, solidifying its reputation as an innovative player in the field. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to excellence and its ability to stand out in a competitive landscape.

data.title: Quilceda Creek to release rare wines to raise $250K for Cancer Research Institute; collection available from October 27.
data.description: A rare collection of library wines is set to be released by Quilceda Creek winery in Snohomish, Washington, on Oct. 27. This initiative is in honor of Cancer Awareness Month, with President Paul Golitzin and General Manager Scott Lloyd leading the efforts. The collection aims to support Cancer Research efforts and raise awareness for the cause.

data.title: Cheerble launches Wicked Ball Rolly, their sixth product launch of 2025, a sustainable playmate for dogs.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 17, 2025, Cheerble, a prominent smart pet technology brand, unveiled the Wicked Ball Rolly, as part of its sixth product launch of the year. This latest innovation showcases the company's dedication to growth, with a total of six new products introduced this year.

data.title: Over 200 casino workers in Shelbyville strike for Teamsters Union recognition. Dealers and dual rates demand rights.
data.description: Over 200 dealers and dual rates, individuals who divide their work between dealing and overseeing the casino floor, have initiated a strike in SHELBYVILLE, Ind., on October 17, 2025. Their primary demand is for Horseshoe Indianapolis to officially acknowledge the Teamsters union as their representative.

data.title: Central Bank of Iceland approves resolution plan for Kvika banki, sets minimum MREL requirements. Act no. 70/2020.
data.description: Today, the Resolution Authority of the Central Bank of Iceland revealed the approval of a resolution plan for Kvika, a bank, in adherence to the Act on Resolution of Credit Institutions and Investment Firms, no. 70/2020. This decision determines the Minimum Requirement for Own Funds and Eligible Liabilities (MREL) for the bank.

data.title: Bitcoin dropped on Friday due to trade tensions and banking issues. Experts are eyeing the critical $103,000 support level.
data.description: On Friday, Bitcoin experienced a decline amidst trade tensions and banking uncertainties. Market analysts are closely watching the crucial support level of $103,000 for any significant developments.

data.title: American Express beats Q3 expectations with earnings of $4.14/share (consensus $3.99/share) and revenues of $18.43 billion (11% YoY growth). Analysts raise estimates.
data.description: American Express Co (NYSE: AXP) exceeded earnings expectations, with revenue surpassing increased expenses, according to Goldman Sachs. Analyst Ryan Nash from Goldman Sachs affirmed a Buy rating and set a price target of $365 for American Express. In the third quarter, the company reported earnings of $4.14 per share, surpassing the consensus of $3.99 per share. Revenues saw an 11% year-on-year increase to $18.43 billion, beating estimates of $18.05 billion, as stated by Nash.

data.title: NCR Voyix (NYSE: VYX) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 6, 2025. Conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET. Phone in at +1 (888) 396-8049.
data.description: NCR Voyix Corporation (NYSE: VYX) is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025, before the market opens. The company, known for its digital commerce solutions, will have its management team conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the outcomes. For those interested in participating, the conference call details are as follows:  Date and Time: November 6, 2025 | 8:00 a.m. ET  Dial In Number: +1 (888) 396-8049 (Toll free) | +1 (416) 764-8646 (Toll)  Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to join the call to gain insights into NCR Voyix Corporation's performance during this period.
